name: Revised Tier II Submission: Add Omitted Chemical
description:
The Green Valley Water Facility omitted Sulfuric Acid (used for pH adjustment) from their original Tier II submission. As the compliance officer, open the EPA Tier2 Submit application and import the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s.

First, change the submission type for the facility from 'Initial' to 'Revised'.

Then, add a new chemical entry to the inventory for Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9). Set EHS to 'Yes' and Trade Secret to 'No'. For physical/health hazards, check 'Skin corrosion or irritation', 'Serious eye damage or eye irritation', and 'Acute toxicity (any route of exposure)'. 

Set the maximum daily amount to 15,000 lbs (Range Code 05) and average daily amount to 10,000 lbs (Range Code 05), with 365 days on site. 

Add a storage location: Physical state is Liquid, Storage Type is 'Above ground tank', Pressure is 'Ambient pressure', Temperature is 'Ambient temperature', and the description is 'Building 2 - Treatment Area'.

Finally, save and export the revised submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\revised_submission.t2s.
